location.meaning: POI coordinate as AMap.LngLat object — .lng/.lat are GCJ-02 (高德/AutoNavi 火星坐标), numeric. NOT WGS-84. Extract inside page context; LngLat does not serialize to Node as an array.
location.source: eyeballed Starbucks(人民公园店) 121.470875,31.231675 against People's Square Shanghai pin — matches GCJ-02, ~150m off WGS-84 as expected

type.meaning: category chain, semicolon-separated, e.g. '餐饮服务;咖啡厅;星巴克咖啡'

rating.meaning: user rating 0-5 as string, e.g. '4.6' (present only with extensions:all; may be '' )

cost.meaning: per-person price 人均 as string yuan, e.g. '30.00' (extensions:all, may be '')

id.meaning: POI id (B-prefixed), used for detail url https://www.amap.com/place/{id}
